name: The Turn Golf Club
about: The Turn Golf Club is a state-of-the-art indoor golf facility that provides year-round golf experiences using Trackman simulators. It offers multiple spacious bays with 24/7 access for members, a focus on swing and impact analysis technology, and an extensive library of over 350 world-renowned courses. The facility caters to a range of skill levels from beginners to PGA professionals and includes coaching, physical therapy, and corporate event options. Membership plans start at $230 per month, providing unlimited access and the ability to book two tee times at once, with the option to bring guests.
why_golfers_like_it: 24/7 access with flexible booking for convenient play anytime
Premium Trackman technology with swing analysis on over 350 courses
Spacious, luxurious bays designed for both individual and group play

food_and_drink.notes: Food option available at The Oak

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify club rental options. It is recommended to bring your own clubs for the best experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue offers food options at The Oak, but there is no mention of a BYOB policy for outside food or drinks.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not provide a specific time for completing 18 holes. Typically, simulator golf can take 2-3 hours depending on the group size and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement for membership is 18, and there are no specific mentions of youth programs or family-friendly activities, indicating it is not primarily focused on children.
